score.description: 0-100. Attractiveness of the market under the fund's mandate: sizing, competitor clusters, structural why-now. Must agree directionally with `rating`.

rating.description: The categorical call, exactly one. The numeric score is its projection for presentation; the two must not point in opposite directions.

position_refs.description: Seat references into the room. Required (>=1) when the room convened; must be empty when it did not.

room_effect.description: How the room moved this dimension. Empty string in degraded no-room mode.

mandate_refs.description: Thesis field names that shaped this rating.

notes.description: Sizing sketch, competitor clusters, the structural why-now — or why-not.
